prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOSPRB100F-100F-BLCK-IR-TT Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 550 Paracord Rope Strong 7 Strand Parachute Cord - Black 100ft Description: The ASR Outdoor parachute cordage is made of type III commercial-grade heavy-duty nylon. It features 7 strands surrounded by a nylon cover designed to be strong yet malleable and is comfortable for tying knots while camping or hiking.

Each paracord roll comes with 100 feet of black cordage and wrapped measures only 7" in length so it will easily fit inside of your camping bag, backpack, or travel bag. Keep it in your car or boat for emergency situations.

The cord has a 550lb breaking strength and workload of 220lbs with a diameter of 3.96mm and 5/32" thickness. It's great for binding, ridgelines for tarps, starting a fire, creating shelter, and repairing outdoor equipment in a pinch. Search Terms: paracord 550 kit rope lanyard cordage parachute cord camping accessories gear essentials nylon cord 3mm hiking backpack gear mens prepper supplies gear outdoor cord heavy duty 100ft car emergency kit supplies survival gear kits tools equipment Features: - HEAVY-DUTY NYLON PARACORD - ASR Outdoor parachute cord rope is made of commercial-grade type III high-strength nylon. It features 7 strands surrounded by a nylon cover with a breaking point of 550lbs - STRONG AND MALLEABLE - 550 nylon paracord is not stiff like similar polyester parachute cords. It's designed to be soft but strong and comfortable to tie knots while out in the field and in emergency situations - LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT - Each paracord roll comes with 100 feet and measures just 7" in length so you can easily store it in your backpack, car, toolbox, boat or hiking bag. It has a 200lb workload, 3.96mm diameter and 5/32" thickness - VERSATILE SURVIVAL CORD - Parachute cord is great for binding cordage, ridge lines for tarps, repairing outdoor equipment, starting a fire, and creating shelter in an emergency situation. Keep it in your emergency kit or bug out bag while camping or hiking - SPECIFICATIONS - Length: 100 feet (about 30 meters); Color: OD green; Breaking point: 550lbs; Workload: 220lbs; Material: 7 strand nylon paracord; Weight: .6lbs; Diameter: 3.96mm; Thickness: 5/32" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 550Lb Breaking Strength, 7 Strand Nylon, Compact 7In Roll, Survival And Emergency Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Type III Commercial-Grade Nylon, 7-Strand Core, 550Lb Strength, Soft And Flexible, Camping Survival Use
